# Local Nax Workflow Smoke Test

Confirm that this workflow was loaded from `.github/nax-flows/local-smoke-test`.

Please return:

1. The workflow name you are running.
2. The repository root and current branch if available.
3. A brief note confirming that project-local workflow discovery is working.
